courses: Thesis: Evaluating the Muon Optimizer vs. AdamW for High-Dimensional LLM Adaptation via LoRA.
Focus on strategic management and quantitative analysis.

publications.name: WDAE-GAN: A hybrid dual autoencoder and generative adversarial framework with wavelet denoising for credit card fraud detection
publications.summary: Developed a Wasserstein GAN and dual autoencoder framework to solve severe class imbalance in financial datasets. Achieved near-perfect detection accuracy (0.9999 AUC) while maintaining extremely low false-positive rates.

publications.name: Scientometric Analysis of the ACL Anthology
publications.summary: Processed and analyzed a dataset of over 67,000 papers to extract trends in NLP research, authorships, and institutional impact.

work.name: Algorithmic Trading ML Infrastructure
work.summary: Architected an end-to-end machine learning pipeline for algorithmic trading.
highlights: Managed a 6-person engineering team using Kanban/Jira methodologies.
Developed custom technical indicators for MetaTrader 5 integration.

work.name: ML-IncomeInsightHub
work.summary: Built a comprehensive machine learning dashboard prioritizing interpretability.
highlights: Implemented SHAP value visualizations for feature importance.
Engineered the backend using FastAPI, established secure geospatial routing with JWT authentication, and containerized the deployment via Docker.
